name: @tuvren/session-client
description: Thin, zero-dependency reference remote peer for the Tuvren duplex session protocol over WebSocket (ADR-060/ADR-061/ADR-062/ADR-063): runs where tools actually execute (browser, Bun, Node >=22) and speaks the handshake/frame/heartbeat wire vocabulary a host server exposes via DuplexSessionBinding -> RemoteClientSession -> createWsSessionTransport.
